| native_name = 和爾賀波神社

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|WD=Q135038714}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183226</ref>

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wanikaha Shrine'''|和爾賀波神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].
